commands: docker exec silent-shield-api python -m app.auth.cli seed

docker exec silent-shield-api python -c "import json, urllib.request; from app.config import get_settings; from app.dwh.partition_demo import ADVISOR_REFS, CHUNK_SIZE; get_settings.cache_clear(); pw=get_settings().auth_seed_password.get_secret_value(); lect=json.loads(get_settings().auth_lecturer_seeds.get_secret_value() or '[]'); pw_by={i['username']:i['password'] for i in lect};
users=[('duy.bk',ADVISOR_REFS[0]),('hoang.nv',ADVISOR_REFS[1]),('trang.pt',ADVISOR_REFS[2]),('giang.nt',ADVISOR_REFS[3])]; seen=set()
for u,_ in users:
  login_pw=pw_by.get(u) or pw
  req=urllib.request.Request('http://127.0.0.1:8000/auth/login', data=json.dumps({'username':u,'password':login_pw}).encode(), headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'}, method='POST')
  with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:
    body=json.load(resp); cookie=(resp.headers.get('Set-Cookie') or '').split(';',1)[0]
  roster=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request('http://127.0.0.1:8000/advisor/roster', headers={'Cookie':cookie})))
  assert roster.get('state')=='ok', roster
  n=roster['classes'][0]['student_count']
  refs={s['student_ref'] for s in roster['classes'][0]['students']}
  assert n==CHUNK_SIZE and refs.isdisjoint(seen)
  seen |= refs
  print(u, 'roster_ok', n)
assert len(seen)==CHUNK_SIZE*4
print('all_lecturer_rosters_disjoint_ok')"
